svg.text: Best for: Simple integrations, scripts, server-to-server
JWT claims: sub, org_id, roles, scope, plan
Best for: Web/mobile apps, M2M, delegated access
Best for: Banking, healthcare, government, zero-trust B2B
⚠ MUST use TLS — credentials are Base64, not encrypted
Best for: Legacy systems, dev environments, simple scripts
PER-API AUTHENTICATION POLICY — Publisher Configures Per API
Mode: ANY (use one of enabled types)
Consumer can authenticate with ANY ONE of:
Orders API — accepts API Key OR OAuth2 JWT
→ Script uses API Key, Web app uses OAuth2
Mode: ALL (must satisfy all enabled types)
Consumer must provide ALL enabled types:
